title: FOAM CONTROL COMPOSITIONS
abstract: This invention relates to a granulated foam control composition comprising a hydrophobic fluid, a hydrophobic filler, a water insoluble carrier, a polyethylene glycol of MW ranging of from 100,000 to 10,000,000, and optionally a binder. A silicone resin, binder, surfactant, or a plasticizer may also be present in the composition. This invention further relates to methods to prepare the granulated foam control compositions. This invention also relates to a detergent composition comprising the granulated foam control composition.
claims:
Claims 1. A granulated foam control composition comprising 1 ) a hydrophobic fluid, 2) a hydrophobic filler, 3) a water insoluble carrier 4) a polyethylene glycol of MW ranging of from 100,000 to 10,000,000, 5) an optional binder. 2. The granulated foam control composition of claim 1 where the hydrophobic fluid is selected from silicone fluid, organic fluid or mixtures thereof. 3. The granulated foam control composition of claim 1 where the water insoluble carrier is selected from silicate, aluminosilicate, starch, or mixtures thereof. 4. The granulated foam control composition of claim 1 where the binder is selected from polycarboxylate, polyvinyl alcohol, poly(meth)acrylic acid, polyacrylamide or mixtures or salts of these. 5. A detergent composition comprising the granulated foam control composition of any of claims 1 to 4. 6. The detergent composition of claim 5 which is a laundry detergent, a detergent for dish washing or a detergent composition for personal care. 7. The detergent composition of claim 6 which is in a solid form. 8. The detergent composition of claim 7 which is the form of a powder, bar or tablet. 9. A method of preparation of a granulated foam composition of any of claims 1 to 4 comprising the sequential steps of 1 ) providing for a liquid foam control composition (i) comprising at least the hydrophobic fluid, the hydrophobic filler, and the binder; 2) providing for a carrier (ii); 3) depositing the liquid foam control composition (i) on the carrier (ii) to produce temporary wet granules; 4) depositing the polyethylene glycol of MW ranging of from 100,000 to 10,000,000 in solid form on the temporary wet granules of step 3); 5) drying the temporary wet granules of step 4) to produce the granulated foam control composition. 10. A method of preparation of a granulated foam composition of any of claims 1 to 4 comprising the sequential steps of 1 ) providing for a liquid foam control composition (i) comprising at least the hydrophobic fluid, the hydrophobic filler, and the binder; 2) providing for a carrier composition (ii) comprising at least the carrier and the polyethylene glycol of MW ranging of from 100,000 to 10,000,000 in solid form; 

 3) depositing the liquid foam control composition (i) on the carrier composition (ii) to produce temporary wet granules; 4) drying the temporary wet granules of step 3) to produce the granulated foam control composition. 1 1 . A method of preparation of a granulated foam composition of any of claims 1 to 4 comprising the sequential steps of 1 ) providing for a liquid foam control composition (i) comprising at least the hydrophobic fluid, the hydrophobic filler, the binder and the polyethylene glycol of MW ranging of from 100,000 to 10,000,000 in diluted form; 2) providing for a carrier (ii); 3) depositing the liquid foam control composition (i) on the carrier (ii) to produce temporary wet granules; 4) drying the temporary wet granules of step 3) to produce the granulated foam control composition. 12. A method to reduce foam during the rinsing stage of a laundry washing procedure by providing for a granulated foam control composition as claimed in any of claims 1 to 4 in a laundry detergent composition. 13. Use of a polyethylene glycol of MW ranging of from 100,000 to 10,000,000 in a granulated foam control composition. 14. Use of a granulated foam control composition as claimed in any of claims 1 to 4 to reduce foam during the rinsing stage of a laundry washing procedure.
